test-appsettings-v2-2026-07-15.description: 37 xUnit tests for AppSettings. All pass. Fallback issue #139 created. Covers all properties including new ones from PR #68.

fix-settings-stale-slider.description: Fix stale slider in SettingsWindow_Closing. Fallback issue #137.

fix-settings-monitor-workarea.description: SettingsWindow on correct monitor. Fallback issue #138.

fix-shadow-color-temp.description: Sync drop shadow glow with color temp. Fallback issue #134.

fix-initial-color-temp-additional-monito.description: Additional monitors init with correct color temp. Fallback issue #131.

fix-persist-all-monitors.description: Persist Show on All Monitors. Fallback issue #130.

perf-color-temp-cache.description: Cache color-temp Color structs + JsonSerializerOptions. Fallback issue #141.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit. Has been manually applying Repo Assist branches (issues #65, #67, #69 closed as completed).

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions CANNOT create PRs - repo has this disabled. All create_pull_request attempts produce fallback issues instead. Fix: Settings -> Actions -> General -> Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests. DO NOT create more PR attempts until this is fixed - causes duplicate issue spam.
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs workflows permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI. Test project targets net8.0 to avoid this.

pending_fallback_issues.139: test: 37 xUnit tests for AppSettings (covers all 8 settings incl. new PR #68 props)
pending_fallback_issues.134: fix: sync drop shadow with color temp
pending_fallback_issues.132: fix: additional monitors color temp (dup of #131)
pending_fallback_issues.130: fix: persist Show on All Monitors

engineering_findings.build_yml: CI only triggers on tags/workflow_dispatch - no PR check. Adding PR check needs workflows permission (blocked). softprops/action-gh-release@v1 could be v2. Updatum 1.2.1->1.4.0 tracked in #140.

notes: 2026-07-19 01:13 run: Tasks 2+4. Task 2: no new human issues; #24 (HDR) already has 2 Repo Assist comments with no new human activity - no comment. Task 4: Reviewed build.yml - CI only on tags, no PR check workflow, softprops/action-gh-release@v1 could be v2, Updatum tracked in #140. PR creation still blocked - no new branches/issues. Strategy: hold off new work until maintainer enables PR creation.
